applied.reason: Loss streak — raise entry bar until pilot regains edge
Loss streak — require stronger volume confirmation

metadata.guidelines:
🧭 SELF-IMPROVEMENT GUIDELINES | 2026-06-29T07:37:49.921775
Combined win rate: 18.9% (buffer=17.2%, returns=20.7%)
• Win rate below 40%: tighten SCALP_STOP_ATR_MULTIPLIER and SCALP_TP_ATR_MULTIPLIER
• Reduce SCAN_INTERVAL_SECONDS to avoid overtrading
• Lower MAX_TRADE_SIZE_USD to preserve capital
• Add 5-min confirmation before entry to filter noise
• Commander guidance (recent):
  - Hi
  - ping - are you there ?
  - Hi
  - Hi
• Recommended parameter adjustments:
  - SCALP_STOP_ATR_MULTIPLIER: 0.9 -> 0.7200000000000001 (reason: tighten stops when WR low; widen when WR strong)
  - SCALP_TP_ATR_MULTIPLIER: 1.5 -> 1.35 (reason: increase targets when WR strong; reduce when WR weak)
  - SCAN_INTERVAL_SECONDS: 30 -> 39.0 (reason: reduce frequency when WR low; increase when WR strong)
  - MAX_TRADE_SIZE_USD: 45464.958000000006 -> 31825.4706 (reason: reduce size when WR poor; increase when WR strong)
  - MAX_RISK_PER_TRADE_USD: 250000.0 -> 187500.0 (reason: tighten per-trade risk when WR low; relax slightly when WR strong)
  - CONFIDENCE_THRESHOLD: 0.68 -> 0.7300000000000001 (reason: raise entry bar when WR low; lower when WR strong)
